title: Alaska Women’s Hall of Fame Nominations – Nov 1
summary: Celebrate an outstanding Alaskan woman by nominating her for induction into the Alaska Women’s Hall of Fame! Nominees are those Alaskan women whose contributions, in any and all fields and endeavors, have influenced the direction of Alaska. Nominations are due November 1, 2010 . To see who has been...

title: Clean Water & Muddy Boots Field Trip – Oct 30
summary: Join SEACC’s clean water and mining expert, GUY ARCHIBALD , on a field trip to learn about the EFFECTS OF POLLUTION AND DISRUPTION IN LOCAL JUNEAU WATERSHEDS from 10am to Noon. Subjects will include water quality and the effects of development on the biology of river ecosystems and river-dwelling li...
